For people and teams wanting to track, share, and manage projects.
Includes:
Unlimited free Contributors
Users that can view, comment, upload attachments, respond to update requests, and submit forms.
Gantt, table, board, and calendar view
View your projects, programs, tasks and work in the format that works best for you.
Rich formulas
Enable users to perform complex computations, link data across multiple sheets, and automate calculations with real-time updates.
Unlimited sheets, forms, and reports
Data management and visualization features that allow easy collaboration, instant insights, and effective project tracking.
250 automations per month
Streamline tasks with automated reminders and update requests.

For businesses looking to align people, projects, and programs.
Includes Pro plan, plus:
Unlimited free Guests
Free users, external to the organization’s domains, who can edit and comment.
Timeline view
Visualize, plan, manage, and share date-based work.
Workload tracking
Essential features to see who's available, what they're working on, and to resolve overallocations.
Admin capabilities
Admins can efficiently manage users, groups, and licenses through the Admin Center.
Unlimited automations
Replace repetitive tasks across your organization with customizable, automated workflows.
1 TB attachment storage
Even more storage to save all of your important files, docs, proofs, images, videos, and more.
Enterprise
Total
/month
Custom pricing
10+ Members
Custom pricing
10+ Members
Contact us
For organizations needing to build complex solutions and company-wide security and controls.
Includes Business plan, plus:
AI formulas, texts, and charts
Unlock actionable insight with AI: write formulas, summarize and categorize text, and visualize sheet data as charts.
New
Scenario Planning
View timelines alongside capacity and explore what-if scenarios without impacting live plans.
NEW
Portfolios
Standardize projects in one place and keep work consistent from intake to reporting.
NEW
SAML-based SSO
Enforce consistent login methods by restricting access options and providing users with the ability to log in through the organization's custom authentication service.
Enterprise Plan Manager
Manage multiple Smartsheet Enterprise accounts in a seamless, centralized and secure way.
Unlimited attachment storage
Unlimited storage so that you can have a source of truth for everything you do.
Directory integrations
Synchronize existing enterprise directory services with Smartsheet to provision and deprovision users.
Best value
Advanced Work Management
Total
/month
Custom pricing
Solutions for your needs
Custom pricing
Solutions for your needs
Contact us
For organizations aiming to manage large scale portfolios of work and connect across their systems.
Includes Enterprise plan, plus:
Control Center
Deliver consistent, visible projects, processes and programs at scale.
Dynamic View
Granular sharing controls enable business owners to share information to the right people, at the right time for viewing or editing.
Data Shuttle
Automate your data movement across platforms.
Connectors
Synchronize data across critical business systems.
DataMesh
Eliminate typos, duplicative data entry, and unnecessary work by mapping data between large sheets and reports.
Calendar App
An interactive and flexible calendar view that allows you to build shareable calendars with custom details.
Pivot App
Summarize and analyze large data stored in sheets or reports and create meaningful comparisons, patterns, and trends.
Premium Support
Live agent and AI-powered in-app chat, ProDesk coaching sessions, priority support with a first response time of 2 hours or less

INTEGRATIONS
Manage work across your tools by integrating with Smartsheet
Deliver new business insights and find new operational efficiencies by integrating with the tools your team is already using.
Contact us
Try Smartsheet for free
Featured integrations

Enterprise systems & operations
AI integrations
Messaging & communication
Content & collaboration
Workflow automation
Security & governance

Leverage and sync data from across your enterprise systems of record
Jira Software
Manage work across platforms and programs to reduce duplicate efforts from developers and provide the visibility and summaries needed by stakeholders throughout the business.
Power BI
Gain valuable insights into your work with the Smartsheet desktop connector for Power BI.
Salesforce
Visualize your sales and pipeline data, make informed decisions, and align sales and implementation teams for efficient, successful delivery of your products and services.
SAP BusinessObjects Business Intelligence
Make better business decisions by leveraging your SAP BO data in Smartsheet.
SAP ERP
Bring enterprise resource planning data into Smartsheet for better reporting and analytics.
ServiceNow
Give stakeholders the insight they need into projects by importing critical data from ServiceNow to Smartsheet.
Tableau
Visualize your Smartsheet data in Tableau for more ways to identify, analyze, and take action on your data.
Workday
Leverage Workday data across your Smartsheet environment.
See full list of Smartsheet integrations
Connect your enterprise AI tools to Smartsheet
Amazon Quick Suite
Connect Smartsheet to Amazon Quick Suite and securely complete tasks based on data and information in your enterprise systems.
Atlassian Rovo
Access your Smartsheet data alongside company data with Rovo’s dedicated Smartsheet connector, so you can deliver accurate, personalized AI insights across your teams.
Claude
Connect your Smartsheet data to Claude to analyze your projects and take action—just by asking. Claude's sophisticated analysis delivers deeper insights and more nuanced understanding of your work.
Glean
By connecting Smartsheet to Glean, team members can quickly search sheets and other project data in Smartsheet to find the information they need, fast.
Microsoft Copilot
Index your sheet content and quickly find Smartsheet data using Copilot chat and search with the Smartsheet Microsoft 365 Copilot connector.
StackAI
Build and deploy custom AI agents that can instantly search, retrieve insights, and automatically log results into your Smartsheet projects.
See full list of Smartsheet integrations
Communicate in the context of your work
Alerts and notifications
Automate workflows to share information fast, pivot, and achieve more while saving time on manual tasks.
Conversations
Smartsheet conversations keep important discussions organized and in context — right where you manage work so your team can take action and achieve more, faster.
Microsoft Teams
Get alerts, send messages to channels, or embed Smartsheet content in your channel tabs to stay informed.
Slack
Keep the context and agility of Slack while gaining the flexibility to collaborate and execute on work in Smartsheet by receiving alerts about changes in your sheets.
See full list of Smartsheet integrations
Streamline how your team manages and reviews content production
Adobe Creative Cloud
Empower creative and marketing teams to collaborate on assets with the Smartsheet extension for Adobe Creative Cloud.
Document Builder
Save time and remove the manual, error-prone steps needed to create customized documents with sheet data.
Docusign
Create documents, send them for signature, and track signing statuses — all from Smartsheet — to save time, reduce costs and errors, and drive your business forward.
Grammarly
Drive projects forward and keep stakeholders informed. Create new Smartsheet tasks or search and link to existing ones from wherever you’re writing.
LucidSpark
Collaborate with your team on a virtual whiteboard and then automatically turn those ideas into structured project plans with the Lucidspark for Smartsheet integration.
Miro
Combine the flexibility of a virtual whiteboard with the work management and automation capabilities of Smartsheet.
Proofing
Streamline and manage content creation and approval directly in Smartsheet.
See full list of Smartsheet integrations
Automate business processes across platforms
Bridge
Create flexible workflows that fit your business processes in a low-code interface for simple, powerful process automation.
Power Automate
Streamline repetitive tasks and paperless processes so you can focus your attention where it’s most needed with Microsoft Power Automate.
Tray.ai
Integrate your entire stack with the leading general automation platform.
UiPath
Automate end-to-end processes in and around Smartsheet with an API-based integration.
Workato
Automate your work. A single platform for integration & workflow automation across your organization.
Zapier
Connect to over 3,000 apps for automated workflows without any code.
See full list of Smartsheet integrations
Manage and track users and data access
Directory integration
Centrally manage users, licensing, and profile attributes through integration with Okta or Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory).
Microsoft Defender
Identify and combat cyberthreats across your cloud services with Defender for Cloud Apps, a comprehensive SaaS security solution with deep visibility, robust data controls, and advanced threat protection.
Skyhigh Security
Find and help remediate sensitive data violations using Skyhigh Security for threat and anomaly detection.
See full list of Smartsheet integrations
AI integrations across your business
Connect your enterprise AI tools to Smartsheet so you can surface insights, automate actions, and keep work moving across your entire tech stack.
Learn more
Key benefits
Unlock siloed data
Create flexible connections between Smartsheet and other business systems to fuel powerful user and AI-generated data insights.
Meet your team where they work
Your business is complex — so are your teams. Different teams have differing needs for tools and data. Use Smartsheet integrations to create that visibility between systems so stakeholders all have the data they need to get their work done.
Get more from the tools you use today
Unlock the value of your enterprise tools with powerful automations that drive data connectivity and interoperability across your systems.
How our customers use integrations
Team communication
Use built-in comment features within Smartsheet and integrate with leading communication tools like Slack and Microsoft Teams.
Data visualization
Create charts from Smartsheet and other data, and embed Power BI and Tableau analytics into Smartsheet dashboards and WorkApps.
Content creation
Use built-in content collaboration features and Smartsheet integrations with Adobe Creative Cloud and digital asset management tools to streamline content creation and management.
Project & services delivery
Use your Salesforce customer data with Smartsheet Control Center to auto-create project plans when deals close.
Request & ticket management
Provide stakeholders with ticket and request status through Smartsheet dashboards using data from systems like Jira or legacy systems via Data Shuttle.
User management
Integrate with leading enterprise IT tools you already use, like Okta and Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory), to seamlessly manage users and permissions in Smartsheet.
Use built-in comment features within Smartsheet and integrate with leading communication tools like Slack and Microsoft Teams.
How our customers use integrations
Team communication
Use built-in comment features within Smartsheet and integrate with leading communication tools like Slack and Microsoft Teams.
Data visualization
Create charts from Smartsheet and other data, and embed Power BI and Tableau analytics into Smartsheet dashboards and WorkApps.
Content creation
Use built-in content collaboration features and Smartsheet integrations with Adobe Creative Cloud and digital asset management tools to streamline content creation and management.
Project and services delivery
Use your Salesforce customer data with Smartsheet Control Center to auto-create project plans when deals close.
Request & ticket management
Provide stakeholders with ticket and request status through Smartsheet dashboards using data from systems like Jira or legacy systems via Data Shuttle.
User management
Integrate with leading enterprise IT tools you already use, like Okta and Microsoft Entra ID (formerly Azure Active Directory), to seamlessly manage users and permissions in Smartsheet.
Data Shuttle
Simple data connections between any system and Smartsheet
Smartsheet Data Shuttle can create automated CSV and XLSX imports of data from most systems into Smartsheet. Follow our updated help content to get started today.
Learn more
Integrations used by 5,000+ customers
With Smartsheet, you can have everything. You can grab things from Power BI or Google Sheets and connect it with Jira and all these applications and systems. It’s like the glue for what you need to do. [...] It’s the single platform for collaboration, the deliverables and even workflows.
DJ Krebsbach
Chief Culture Officer, Dell Boomi
Read their story
Frequently Asked Questions
What are Smartsheet integrations?
Smartsheet integrations enable you to automate routine workflows across tools, provide visibility into your work, and connect data across your enterprise systems like CRMs, HCMs, and ERPs. Smartsheet has over 175 integrations with the business tools you use today, such as Slack, Jira, Salesforce, and Tableau.
Smartsheet integrates with many products across the Microsoft and Google suite of products, including
Microsoft Teams
,
Power BI
,
Outlook
,
OneDrive
,
Entra ID
,
Google Drive
,
Google Calendar
,
Gmail
,
Google Maps
, and more.
Learn more
Are Smartsheet integrations an additional cost? What plans include Smartsheet integrations?
Some Smartsheet integrations are included in Business and Enterprise accounts, while some integrations are paid add-ons. To learn more about the integration in question, please review the information on our
marketplace
or
contact us
to learn more.
How can I learn more about Smartsheet integrations?
Learn more about the available Smartsheet integrations by reviewing our
marketplace
or
contacting us
.
How can I create custom, flexible integrations and workflows between Smartsheet and other systems?
The Smartsheet API is free and available for use for any users with a Smartsheet license on a Business plan or

analysis.name: Smartsheet
analysis.tagline: Intelligent Work Management with AI at its core
analysis.value_proposition: A no-code enterprise work management platform combining project tracking, automation, and AI to help PMO, IT, and operations teams manage projects, programs, and portfolios at scale.
analysis.ideal_customer: Enterprise PMO, IT portfolio managers, and operations leaders needing scalable project and portfolio management with deep integrations into existing enterprise systems

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Visualize project timelines with dependencies and milestones in Gantt chart format
features.evidence_quote: Gantt, table, board, and calendar view — View your projects, programs, tasks and work in the format that works best

features.name: board view
features.description: Kanban-style board for managing tasks in columns
features.evidence_quote: Gantt, table, board, and calendar view

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Visualize date-based work items in a calendar layout
features.evidence_quote: Gantt, table, board, and calendar view

features.name: table view
features.description: Spreadsheet-style grid for data entry and task management
features.evidence_quote: Gantt, table, board, and calendar view

features.name: timeline view
features.description: Visualize, plan, manage, and share date-based work in a Gantt-timeline format
features.evidence_quote: Timeline view — Visualize, plan, manage, and share date-based work.

features.name: card view
features.description: Card-style visualization for project tasks and items
features.evidence_quote: Views — Visualize your project using timeline, board, grid, Gantt, card, and calendar views.

features.name: rich formulas
features.description: Complex computations, cross-sheet data linking, and real-time automated calculations
features.evidence_quote: Rich formulas — Enable users to perform complex computations, link data across multiple sheets

features.name: automated workflows
features.description: Replace repetitive tasks with customizable automated triggers and actions
features.evidence_quote: 250 automations per month — Streamline tasks with automated reminders and update requests.

features.name: unlimited automations
features.description: No cap on automation runs for Business plan and above
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited automations — Replace repetitive tasks across your organization with customizable, automated workflows.

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Real-time visual dashboards with configurable widgets to centralize data and track progress
features.evidence_quote: Dashboards — Provide a real-time view of critical data and centralize information into one place.

features.name: widgets
features.description: Configurable dashboard widgets to organize data, track progress, and share insights with teams
features.evidence_quote: Widget — Configure widgets on dashboards to help organize data, track progress, and share insights

features.name: forms
features.description: Build intake forms to collect and act on data, feeding directly into sheets
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited sheets, forms, and reports — Data management and visualization features

features.name: reports
features.description: Cross-sheet roll-up reports to share consolidated data views and key insights
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited sheets, forms, and reports — Data management and visualization features

features.name: workload tracking
features.description: See who's available, what they're working on, and resolve resource overallocations
features.evidence_quote: Workload tracking — Essential features to see who's available, what they're working on, and to resolve overallocations.

features.name: workload balancing
features.description: Balance team workloads and plan capacity across projects
features.evidence_quote: Workload balancing and capacity planning

features.name: resource management
features.description: Advanced resource planning, utilization forecasting, and capacity management (premium add-on)
features.evidence_quote: Resource Management — Getting started with Resource Management

features.name: portfolio management
features.description: Portfolio-level dashboards and real-time visibility across multiple projects and programs
features.evidence_quote: Portfolio-level dashboards — Real-time project/portfolio visibility

features.name: control center
features.description: Standardize, automate, and scale project and portfolio management across the organization
features.evidence_quote: Smartsheet Control Center — Standardize, automate, and scale project and portfolio management.

features.name: milestone and dependency tracking
features.description: Track project milestones and inter-task dependencies for schedule management
features.evidence_quote: Milestone and dependency tracking

features.name: ai-powered insights
features.description: Personalized AI analysis to surface deeper insights and tailored solutions for work management
features.evidence_quote: Make work management your team's superpower with Smartsheet AI. Get personalized insights, deeper analysis

features.name: ai-powered reporting
features.description: AI-generated reports and analysis for client and stakeholder delivery
features.evidence_quote: AI-powered reporting for customers

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Use Smartsheet from within AI clients via Model Context Protocol server integration
features.evidence_quote: MCP Server — Use Smartsheet from within AI clients.

features.name: digital asset management
features.description: Brandfolder-powered creative asset management, organization, and distribution platform
features.evidence_quote: Digital asset management

features.name: brandfolder
features.description: Enterprise DAM for brand asset storage, governance, sharing, and metadata management
features.evidence_quote: Brandfolder — (Premium feature)

features.name: brandguide
features.description: Create brand usage guides to standardize how teams access and use brand assets
features.evidence_quote: Brandguide — Create straightforward guides for how to use brand assets.

features.name: content automation
features.description: Create, customize, and manage brand assets at scale with multi-editing and bulk creation
features.evidence_quote: Content Automation asset library — Create, customize, and manage brand assets at scale

features.name: proofing
features.description: Review, annotate, and approve images, videos, documents, and PDFs within Brandfolder
features.evidence_quote: Proofing — Review, edit, and approve images, videos, documents, and PDFs.

features.name: bulk asset management
features.description: Bulk editing tools in Brandfolder for managing large volumes of creative assets
features.evidence_quote: Bulk Management — Save time with bulk editing tools.

features.name: bridge
features.description: No-code integration platform connecting data across systems and automating routine tasks
features.evidence_quote: Bridge — Connect your data across systems and automate routine tasks with Bridge.

features.name: workapps
features.description: Build no-code custom work applications on top of live Smartsheet data
features.evidence_quote: WorkApps — (Premium feature)

features.name: pivot app
features.description: Summarize and dynamically refresh data from multiple sheets in pivot table format
features.evidence_quote: Pivot App — Summarize and dynamically refresh data.

features.name: datamesh
features.description: Sync and map data across multiple sheets to reduce duplication and maintain consistency
features.evidence_quote: DataMesh — Sync and map data across multiple sheets.

features.name: data shuttle
features.description: Automatically import/export data across platforms to improve visibility and enable data-driven decisions
features.evidence_quote: Data Shuttle — Improve visibility and enable data-driven decisions by automatically moving data across platforms.

features.name: datatable
features.description: Visualize and collaborate on large datasets by connecting multiple data sources
features.evidence_quote: DataTable — Visualize and collaborate on large data sets by connecting many data sources.

features.name: dynamic view
features.description: Share specific sheet data with the right people at the right time with role-based viewing/editing
features.evidence_quote: Dynamic View — Share information with the right people at the right time for viewing and editing.

features.name: document builder
features.description: Generate documents automatically using row data from sheets (e.g. contracts, proposals)
features.evidence_quote: Document builder — Generate documents using row data.

features.name: calendar app
features.description: Premium calendar app connecting Smartsheet data and forms to visualize events in multiple views
features.evidence_quote: Calendar App — Connect your Smartsheet data and forms to visualize your events in multiple views.

features.name: workspaces
features.description: Organize, manage, and collaborate on all project-related content in shared containers
features.evidence_quote: Workspaces — Organize, manage, and collaborate on all of your project-related content.

features.name: attachments
features.description: Attach and manage files directly within sheets, rows, and comments
features.evidence_quote: Attachments — Attach and manage files directly within sheets, rows, and comments.

features.name: attachment storage (1 tb)
features.description: 1 TB cloud storage for files, docs, images, videos on Business plan
features.evidence_quote: 1 TB attachment storage — Even more storage to save all of your important files, docs, proofs, images, videos

features.name: templates
features.description: Pre-built solution templates with best practices to accelerate project and program setup
features.evidence_quote: Templates — Pre-built solutions that save time, maintain consistency, and ensure best practices across projects.

features.name: columns
features.description: Define, organize, and manage structured data using typed columns with multiple field types
features.evidence_quote: Columns — Define, organize, and manage your data using columns.

features.name: admin center
features.description: Central admin interface to manage users, groups, licenses, and organizational governance
features.evidence_quote: Admin capabilities — Admins can efficiently manage users, groups, and licenses through the Admin Center.

features.name: user management
features.description: Add, manage, and remove users within the organization from a central interface
features.evidence_quote: User management — Add, manage, and remove users within your organization.

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on and enterprise authentication configuration for secure access
features.evidence_quote: Authentication — Set up secure authentication and login methods.

features.name: security controls
features.description: Access controls and compliance measures to protect account and data
features.evidence_quote: Security — Protect your account and data with access controls and compliance measures.

features.name: secure request management
features.description: Centralized intake and approval workflows for secure work requests
features.evidence_quote: Secure request management — Centralized intake and approval workflows

features.name: free contributors
features.description: Unlimited free contributor seats that can view, comment, upload attachments, and submit forms
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited free Contributors — Users that can view, comment, upload attachments, respond to update requests

features.name: free guests
features.description: Unlimited free external guest seats (outside org domains) that can edit and comment on Business+

differentiators: 3x Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Collaborative Work Management
AI at its core with MCP Server for direct AI client integration
No-code WorkApps built directly on top of live Smartsheet data
Advanced Work Management platform with Control Center for enterprise-scale PMO
Integrated digital asset management via Brandfolder (built-in DAM + creative ops)
Unlimited free Contributors and Guests enabling large-scale external collaboration at no extra cost
Content Automation for brand asset creation and governance at enterprise scale

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1-10 members, unlimited contributors, Gantt/board/calendar/table views, rich formulas, 250 automations/mo

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3+ members, unlimited guests + contributors, timeline view, workload tracking, unlimited automations, 1 TB storage

pricing.notes: Monthly pricing is $12/seat (Pro) and $24/seat (Business). Pro capped at 10 paid members; Business minimum 3 paid members. Contributors (view/comment/submit) and Guests (edit/comment, external) are free add-on roles. Enterprise plan pricing requires contact sales. 13 currency options available.
